REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER TO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE IS OVERRULED. DEMURRER TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR UCL VIOLATION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE LOSS OF MONEY OR PROPERTY CAUSED BY THE UNLAWFUL, FRAUDULENT OR UNFAIR PRACTICES. DEMURRER TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF CCC 2923.6, 2923.7 AND 12 CFR 1024.41(G) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE DAMAGES CAUSED BY VIOLATIONS (AS OPPOSED TO DAMAGES CAUSED BY DEFAULT). ADDITIONALLY, PLAINTIFF MAY ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING THAT CC 2923.6 SURVIVED THE REPEAL AND/OR ALLEGE A CAUSE OF ACTION UNDER CC 2924.11. ALL AMENDMENTS SHALL BE IN BOLD FONT. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2019 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2019 Continued To Feb-27-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Continued To Jan-23-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2018 Continued To Dec-12-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-23-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sarah Shapero (415-985-5708) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Josefina Pacumio.
Patil Derderian (213-457-8000) for Defendant/Moving party Wells Fargo Bank via Courtcall.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Plaintiff submits to the ruling. Hearing is held. Argued re: Negligence, duty and factors. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to cause of action for negligence is overruled. Demurrer to causes of action for UCL violation is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege loss of money or property caused by the unlawful, fraudulent or unfair practices. Demurrer to causes of action for violation of CCC 2923.6, 2923.7 and 12 CFR 1024.41(g) is sustained with leave to amend to allege damages caused by violations (as opposed to damages caused by default). Additionally, Plaintiff may allege facts showing that CC 2923.6 survived the repeal and/or allege a cause of action under CC 2924.11. All amendments shall be in bold font. Plaintiff's counsel to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2018 Continued To Oct-10-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-26-2018 Continued To Aug-23-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to August 23, 2018. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the reply and the operative complaint to department 501 no later than July 31, 2018 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2018 Continued To Aug-22-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar. Plaintiff filed a First Amended Complaint on May 16, 2018. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
